About

About Me

I’m a UX designer focused on designing products that balance user needs, business goals, and technical realities.

My Approach

I combine qualitative research, interaction design, and systems thinking to create experiences that feel intuitive and dependable. My process is collaborative, evidence-driven, and grounded in clear problem framing.

What I Bring

  • UX strategy and roadmap alignment
  • Information architecture and interaction design
  • Usability testing and iterative prototyping
  • Design system contribution and cross-functional delivery
